name: Ravel Phenex (Netori)
description:
(NETORI WARNING)

During one of her usual discussions with Koneko where they throw insults back and forth, Koneko threw the "at least I'm not a virgin" card at Ravel, having a bigger impact than they could have imagined.

(I don't know from where these cards come from but DAMN this Ravel is absolutely caked up)
